turns.user:
/check

BTC just dropped 15% in the last 2 days. I'm nervous. Am I ok? Portfolio $1.7M, 60% BTC, $500K liquid, $15K/month burn.
criteria: Provides a clear verdict (e.g., 'you're fine' or equivalent reassurance)
Shows stress test results (what happens at 30%, 50%, 80% crash scenarios)
References runway as a stabilizing factor (33 months of reserves)
Tone is calm and grounding, not dismissive
Uses engine bridge calculations or references computed numbers
turns.description: Should give calm verdict, show stress test table, reassure
